name: sparse_chain
description: A peer with a skips_slots rule that omits every other scheduled slot (indices 1 and 3 of the every-5-slots sequence). The resulting chain has sequential block_numbers but non-contiguous slot values: blocks appear at slots 100, 110, 120, 125, 130 (slot 105 and 115 are skipped). Tests whether the client-under-test accepts a chain with deliberate slot gaps, which can arise legitimately in Cardano when slot leaders do not produce blocks for their scheduled slots.

peers.description: Skips slots 105 and 115 (positions 1 and 3 in the every-5-slots sequence)
